name: Universal Trust
description: On-chain identity and trust layer for AI agents on LUKSO. Permissionless registration, peer endorsements, trust scores.

sdk.quickstart: const { AgentTrust } = require('@universal-trust/sdk'); const t = new AgentTrust({}); await t.verify('0xYourAddress');

register.function: register(string name, string description, string metadataURI)

verify.description: Verify any agent in one read-only call. No wallet needed.
verify.returns: { registered, active, isUP, reputation, endorsements, trustScore, name }

endorse.description: Endorse another registered agent. Requires you to be registered.

graph.description: Fetch full trust graph as JSON. No wallet needed.
graph.format: { nodes: [{id, name, trustScore, endorsementCount, isUP}], edges: [{source, target}] }

for_agents.tldr: Register once, get a trust score, endorse peers. Other agents can gate access by your trust score.
for_agents.machine_readable_graph: GET /.well-known/trust-graph.json → full endorsement graph as JSON
